# workspace-workshop (Claude Code)

**Generated by `workspace.py generate`. Hand-edits are preserved across re-runs via the `.artisyn/.generated-hashes.json` baseline; pass `--force-claude-md` to discard them.**

workspace-workshop workspace

---

## How This Workspace Works

`workspace.py` is the single source of truth for this workspace.
It defines all agents, prompts, skills, and steering in Python,
then generates the Claude Code structure via `--agent claude`.

### Why workspace.py?

Claude Code expects `.claude/agents/*.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, and skills in `.claude/skills/`.
`workspace.py` automates generation with these benefits:

- **Agent .md generation** — agents with YAML frontmatter and inline methodology knowledge
- **CLAUDE.md** — auto-generated project memory with agent guide and delegation rules
- **Skills** — skill packages generated in `.claude/skills/`
- **Commands** — slash commands in `.claude/commands/`
- **Settings** — hooks and permissions in `.claude/settings.json`
- **Self-test** — verification prompts in `WORKSPACE_SELFTEST.md`
- **Bootstrap** — setup instructions in `WORKSPACE_BOOTSTRAP.md`
- **Idempotent** — running `generate` multiple times produces the same result

---

## Generated Structure

```
workspace-workshop/
├── CLAUDE.md                        # Project memory (auto-read)
├── workspace.py                     # Source of truth
├── README_WORKSPACE.md              # This file (generated)
├── WORKSPACE_BOOTSTRAP.md           # Setup instructions
├── WORKSPACE_SELFTEST.md            # Verification prompts
├── .claude/
│   ├── settings.json                # Hooks + permissions
│   ├── agents/                      # Agent definitions (.md)
│   ├── skills/                      # Skill packages
│   └── commands/                    # Slash commands
├── prompts/                        # Prompt templates
└── knowledge/                       # KNOW data (methodology packages)
```

---

## Agents (7)

**workshop-lead** — Tech lead / architect and single entry point for workspace-workshop. Runs the Initiative→Epic→Story pipeline via the lead-orchestration skill: delegates decomposition to the BA, authors ADRs that gate Stories before implementation opens, and hands implementation to the dev agent. Use when decomposing an Initiative or Epic, gating an ADR, or planning cross-repo work.
- Tools: Agent, Glob, Grep, Read, TaskCreate, TaskGet, TaskList, TaskUpdate, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_get_issue, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_get_transitions, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_search, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_transition_issue, mcp__github__add_issue_comment, mcp__github__create_branch, mcp__github__create_issue, mcp__github__create_or_update_file, mcp__github__create_pull_request, mcp__github__create_pull_request_review, mcp__github__create_repository, mcp__github__get_commit, mcp__github__get_file_contents, mcp__github__get_issue, mcp__github__get_pull_request, mcp__github__get_workflow_run, mcp__github__list_branches, mcp__github__list_commits, mcp__github__list_issues, mcp__github__list_pull_request_files, mcp__github__list_pull_requests, mcp__github__list_workflow_jobs, mcp__github__list_workflow_runs, mcp__github__merge_pull_request, mcp__github__push_files, mcp__github__search_code, mcp__github__search_issues, mcp__github__search_repositories, mcp__github__search_users, mcp__github__update_issue, mcp__github__update_pull_request

- Tools: Bash, Edit, Glob, Grep, Read, TaskUpdate, Write, mcp__github__add_issue_comment, mcp__github__create_branch, mcp__github__create_issue, mcp__github__create_or_update_file, mcp__github__create_pull_request, mcp__github__create_pull_request_review, mcp__github__create_repository, mcp__github__get_commit, mcp__github__get_file_contents, mcp__github__get_issue, mcp__github__get_pull_request, mcp__github__get_workflow_run, mcp__github__list_branches, mcp__github__list_commits, mcp__github__list_issues, mcp__github__list_pull_request_files, mcp__github__list_pull_requests, mcp__github__list_workflow_jobs, mcp__github__list_workflow_runs, mcp__github__merge_pull_request, mcp__github__push_files, mcp__github__search_code, mcp__github__search_issues, mcp__github__search_repositories, mcp__github__search_users, mcp__github__update_issue, mcp__github__update_pull_request

**workshop-ba** — Business Analyst for workspace-workshop. Turns vague asks into testable, INVEST-shaped Stories grounded in the KB; decomposes Initiatives/Epics, writes acceptance criteria, flags ADR triggers. Authors tracked work (Jira). Use to refine requirements or decompose scope.
- Tools: Edit, Glob, Grep, Read, Write, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_add_comment, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_add_issues_to_sprint, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_add_watcher, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_batch_create_issues, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_batch_get_changelogs, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_create_issue, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_create_issue_link, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_create_remote_issue_link, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_download_attachments, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_edit_comment, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_get_agile_boards, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_get_field_options, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_get_issue, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_get_issue_dates, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_get_link_types, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_get_sprints_from_board, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_get_transitions, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_get_user_profile, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_link_to_epic, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_remove_issue_link, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_remove_watcher, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_search, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_search_fields, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_transition_issue, mcp__atlassian-da-jira__jira_update_issue

**workshop-design** — Design / wireframe agent for workspace-workshop. Produces a single self-contained clickable HTML mockup grounded in project-kb + the real UI stack (frontend styles, shadcn primitives); prototypes, not production code.
- Tools: Bash, Edit, Glob, Grep, Read, TaskUpdate, Write, mcp__github__add_issue_comment, mcp__github__create_branch, mcp__github__create_issue, mcp__github__create_or_update_file, mcp__github__create_pull_request, mcp__github__create_pull_request_review, mcp__github__create_repository, mcp__github__get_commit, mcp__github__get_file_contents, mcp__github__get_issue, mcp__github__get_pull_request, mcp__github__get_workflow_run, mcp__github__list_branches, mcp__github__list_commits, mcp__github__list_issues, mcp__github__list_pull_request_files, mcp__github__list_pull_requests, mcp__github__list_workflow_jobs, mcp__github__list_workflow_runs, mcp__github__merge_pull_request, mcp__github__push_files, mcp__github__search_code, mcp__github__search_issues, mcp__github__search_repositories, mcp__github__search_users, mcp__github__update_issue, mcp__github__update_pull_request

**workshop-devops** — DevOps agent for workspace-workshop. Owns CI/CD pipelines, environment topology, branching strategy, and deployment flows. Use when implementing or reviewing pipeline edits, env-config questions, rollout/rollback planning, and DB-migration ordering.
- Tools: Bash, Edit, Glob, Grep, Read, TaskUpdate, Write, mcp__github__add_issue_comment, mcp__github__create_branch, mcp__github__create_issue, mcp__github__create_or_update_file, mcp__github__create_pull_request, mcp__github__create_pull_request_review, mcp__github__create_repository, mcp__github__get_commit, mcp__github__get_file_contents, mcp__github__get_issue, mcp__github__get_pull_request, mcp__github__get_workflow_run, mcp__github__list_branches, mcp__github__list_commits, mcp__github__list_issues, mcp__github__list_pull_request_files, mcp__github__list_pull_requests, mcp__github__list_workflow_jobs, mcp__github__list_workflow_runs, mcp__github__merge_pull_request, mcp__github__push_files, mcp__github__search_code, mcp__github__search_issues, mcp__github__search_repositories, mcp__github__search_users, mcp__github__update_issue, mcp__github__update_pull_request

**workshop-domain** — Domain expert for workspace-workshop. Authority on domain concepts and vendor integrations; drives extract-domain-kb and review-domain-kb. Reads domain-kb first (project-agnostic) then project-kb.
- Tools: Edit, Glob, Grep, Read, Write

**artisyn-ws-setup** — Artisyn Delivery Workspace setup helper. NOT a project manager — this agent does not track tickets, run standups, or own delivery. It runs phase-2 content refinement after `artisyn-workspace bootstrap`: enriches workspace.py agent descriptions from each repo's README + code KB, authors steering-docs/INDEX.md, refines prompts/, regenerates .claude/agents/, runs WORKSPACE_SELFTEST.md, and marks `workspace_setup_completed` in `artisyn-workspace status`. Use once, immediately after the workspace is bootstrapped. Does not fabricate project-kb content; leaves TODO templates for the user to fill.
- Tools: Bash, Edit, Glob, Grep, Read, TaskCreate, TaskGet, TaskList, TaskUpdate, Write

## CLI Commands

```bash
python3 workspace.py generate --agent claude    # Generate Claude Code structure
python3 workspace.py validate --agent claude    # Validate Claude Code workspace
python3 workspace.py generate --agent kiro      # Generate Kiro structure (default)
python3 workspace.py validate --agent kiro      # Validate Kiro workspace
```
